posts.title: How I Pick Topics for Mind & Matter
posts.preview: A quick behind-the-scenes look at how I select science and technology stories for this site.
posts.content:
I focus on topics where science intersects with real engineering impact, especially semiconductors, AI infrastructure, energy systems, and space technology.

Each post starts with one key question: what changed recently, and why should a reader care now?

Then I map the technical context, remove jargon, and keep only the details that improve understanding without overwhelming the reader.
